items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 southbound between Exit 9B/9A: PA 420 - PROSPECT PARK / ESSINGTON and 1 miles SOUTH of Exit 9B/9A: PA 420 - PROSPECT PARK / ESSINGTON. There is a lane restriction.
